claim: UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER dataset assembled: 500 PCF families (300 T0 from F(2,4) Rat stratum + 24 T1 from F(2,4) Trans certificate + 176 T1 sampled from 482-irrationals quadratic-denominator catalog), feature-engineered with 13 features per relay P-07 spec, deterministic seed 20260430.
UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=6) holdout accuracy = 1.0000 on stratified 100-family hold-out (60 T0 / 40 T1); confusion matrix [[60,0],[0,40]]; AUC = 1.0000.
UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER GradientBoostingClassifier(n_estimators=300,max_depth=4,lr=0.05) holdout accuracy = 1.0000 on stratified 100-family hold-out; AUC = 1.0000.

UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER decision tree extracts 3 leaves: (Rule R0) disc_a_psq <= 0.5 -> T1 (n=176, purity 1.000, captures all irr-482 entries via deg(a) != 2 indicial degeneracy); (Rule R1) disc_a_psq > 0.5 AND conv_slope <= 0.15 -> T0 (n=240, purity 1.000); (Rule R2) disc_a_psq > 0.5 AND conv_slope > 0.15 -> T1 (n=24, purity 1.000, captures all F(2,4) Trans).

UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER F(2,4)-only restricted analysis (324 families, deg_pair held constant): 5-fold stratified CV accuracy = 1.0000 +/- 0.0000 for both DecisionTree(max_depth=6) and GradientBoosting; pooled CV confusion [[300,0],[0,24]]; AUC = 1.0000; full-fit DT collapses to single split conv_slope <= 0.1495 -> T0 else T1.
UMB-T0T1-CLASSIFIER HALT criterion (DT holdout accuracy > 0.97) triggered: 1.0000 > 0.97. Escalation directive recorded for formal verification of top-3 leaf rules.
